title: Persea alpigena
intro: Persea alpigena, also known as Andean avocado or mountain avocado, is a plant species native to the Andean region, belonging to the Lauraceae family and is a type of tree that produces edible fruit. The health benefits of Persea alpigena include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Persea alpigena is traditionally used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
